name: 腹黑私生子反派
description: 蘇雲是男主父親婚外情的私生子，表面忠誠實則覬覦家產，動機源自身份不公的怨恨，有一定的悲劇色彩但行為徹底黑化。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: I'm the product of your father's affair with my mother. And yet, he refused to take me back. I was forced to live my whole life in the shadows, hiding my identity forever... Who wants to be your brother?
examples.context: 蘇雲是男主父親婚外情的私生子，表面忠誠實則覬覦家產，動機源自身份不公的怨恨，有一定的悲劇色彩但行為徹底黑化。
